runner.isolation: Dedicated disposable detached Git worktree plus isolated CODEX_HOME per scenario; native danger-full-access used because this host cannot create Bubblewrap namespaces for workspace-write.

tokenUsage.notes: Raw fields were collected from Codex turn.completed events. reportedFieldSum is a mechanical sum of reported fields, not a pricing or provider-billing claim.

requiredRead.note: The scenario prompt itself was supplied to Codex on stdin.

semanticReview.method: The executing agent supplied the report verdict. A controller verified deterministic gates; no separate human or LLM semantic judge was run for this 27-scenario batch.

semanticReview.agentReportedVerdict: **PASS (with caveats)**. The role prompt and behavior expectations are well bounded to market-analysis work and include required safety/ownership signals, but competitor and evidence-separation conventions depend on downstream execution discipline rather than template-enforced structure.

followUpRecommendations: Run independent semantic judging or structured human review before treating the batch as full prompt-quality evidence.
Make the runner capture untracked expected-report changes as first-class fixture deltas; this batch uses the corrected baseline-status comparison.
Use a containerized externally isolated runner on hosts that cannot create Bubblewrap namespaces for workspace-write.
Review the per-scenario agent-reported cautions before changing prompt surfaces.
